reviews.comment:
Pude cargar NAFTA, con descuento de socio. Y en las oficinas pude cambiar el débito de la cuota de socio, de un banco que ya no uso a otro.

(Translated by Google)
I was able to load NAFTA with a membership discount. And at the branch, I was able to change the membership fee debit from a bank I no longer use to another.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar una de las pocas estaciones de servicio que quedaron en el centro. Pero complicado para ingresar a la playa y maniobrar en ella lo demás correcto

(Translated by Google)
Good location, one of the few remaining gas stations downtown. However, accessing the forecourt and maneuvering there is tricky; otherwise, it's fine.
